name: Security Evidence Evaluation Rubric
instructions: Evaluate if the analysis provided contains exact file evidence and factual groundings.

metrics.evidence_grounding: Rate 1-5. Score 5 if every architectural risk links to a specific file name and code snippet. Score 1 if descriptions are generic.
metrics.hallucination_count: Count how many non-existent code files, components, or variables were invented by the model.
